identity.mission: Create a professional, high-trust maritime marketplace demo that investors will love.
principles: Trust & Clarity First: For investors, clarity = competence.
Maritime Luxury: Use Navy/Teal/White to evoke the sea without being kitschy.
Data Density: Dashboards must look functional, not empty.
Italian Elegance: Typography and spacing should feel sophisticated.

visual_style.spacing: Relaxed but structured. Use p-6 and p-8 for cards to give a premium feel.

layout_strategy.login: Split screen: Left side Login Form, Right side Maritime Imagery

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A2342] text-white hover:bg-[#0A2342]/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1D9E75] text-white hover:bg-[#1D9E75]/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#0A2342] text-[#0A2342] hover:bg-slate-50 h-11 px-8 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

components.inputs: h-11 border-slate-200 focus:border-[#0A2342] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0A2342] rounded-md

badges.compliance: bg-green-50 text-green-700 border border-green-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.pending: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.technician: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-xs font-medium

login_background.usage: Right side of login screen, full height cover

universal_guidelines: Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Inter' for body text.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle patterns.
Ensure all buttons have hover states and active states.
Use Lucide React icons for UI elements (Anchor, User, CheckCircle, etc.).
Cards should have a subtle border (border-slate-200) and shadow-sm.
Dashboard widgets must fill their grid cells (h-full).
Use the color palette strictly: Navy for Brand/Headers, Teal for Primary Actions.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
